commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Human maintainer review should gate this protected, security-adjacent approval UX/protocol PR; I did not find a narrow ClawSweeper repair defect.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression found; the diff adds approval metadata, rendering, generated protocol output, tests, and a changelog entry without new dependencies, workflows, permissions, secre... (sha=1c5ecaa14aa5c1833027f8c68675299507d13aa8)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds parser-derived shell command span metadata to exec approval registration and gateway payloads, then renders highlighted command fragments in the Web Control UI modal with tests and generated protocol updates.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR rather than a reported bug. Source inspection gives a clear before/after path: current main lacks `commandSpans` and renders plain command text, while the PR head adds parser-backed metadata and Web rendering tests.
commands.review_followup: Human maintainer review should gate this protected, security-adjacent approval UX/protocol PR; I did not find a narrow ClawSweeper repair defect.
